title: 确立 vLLM v1 模型契约（以 Llama 为最简参考）
code_spine: vllm/model_executor/model_loader/__init__.py:L128-L140  get_model() → get_model_loader() 按 load_format 选 loader，loader.load_model()

vllm/model_executor/model_loader/base_loader.py:L42-L82  BaseModelLoader.load_model()：set_default_torch_dtype + target_device 上下文 → initialize_model() 建空壳 → self.load_weights() → process_weights_after_loading() → model.eval()

vllm/model_executor/model_loader/utils.py:L40-L63  initialize_model()：get_model_architecture() 拿到模型类（LlamaForCausalLM），校验其 __init__ 接受 (vllm_config, prefix)，在 set_current_vllm_config() 内 model_class(vllm_config=..., prefix=...)
vllm/model_executor/models/llama.py:L515-L560  LlamaForCausalLM.__init__：从 vllm_config 取 hf_config/quant_config → _init_model() 建 LlamaModel → 末段 rank 建 ParallelLMHead + LogitsProcessor
vllm/model_executor/models/llama.py:L253-L314  LlamaDecoderLayer.__init__：从 vllm_config 解包 config/cache_config/quant_config → self_attn=LlamaAttention + mlp=LlamaMLP + 两个 RMSNorm
vllm/model_executor/models/llama.py:L124-L221  LlamaAttention.__init__：TP 切头数 → QKVParallelLinear(qkv_proj) + RowParallelLinear(o_proj) + get_rope() + Attention(self.attn) 统一封装
vllm/model_executor/model_loader/default_loader.py:L376-L388  DefaultModelLoader.load_weights() → model.load_weights(self.get_all_weights(...)) 把磁盘上的 checkpoint 张量流喂给模型
vllm/model_executor/models/llama.py:L436-L498  LlamaModel.load_weights：stacked_params_mapping 把 checkpoint 的 q/k/v_proj、gate/up_proj 名字重写成 qkv_proj/gate_up_proj 并带 shard_id 调用各层 weight_loader
vllm/model_executor/layers/linear.py:L1187-L1389  QKVParallelLinear.weight_loader：按 shard_id(q/k/v) 算 offset/size，对 q 用 tp_rank、对 k/v 用 tp_rank//num_kv_head_replicas，narrow 出本 rank 切片 copy 进 fused 参数
vllm/model_executor/layers/linear.py:L694-L868  MergedColumnParallelLinear.weight_loader：按 shard_id(0=gate,1=up) 算 offset/size，narrow 本 rank 切片填入 gate_up_proj
vllm/model_executor/layers/linear.py:L1499-L1532  RowParallelLinear.weight_loader：沿 input_dim 按 tp_rank narrow（行切分）
vllm/model_executor/model_loader/utils.py:L99-L122  process_weights_after_loading：先各层 quant_method.process_weights_after_loading()，再对 Attention 层调 module.process_weights_after_loading(dtype)
vllm/model_executor/models/llama.py:L395-L434  LlamaModel.forward：embed → 逐层 LlamaDecoderLayer(positions,hidden,residual) → 末 RMSNorm；前向数据流

vllm/model_executor/layers/attention/attention.py:L409-L501  Attention.forward：reshape q/k/v → unified_kv_cache_update + unified_attention_with_output（自定义算子，经 forward_context 取 attn_metadata/kv_cache）

embed_excerpts.what: LlamaForCausalLM —— 模型契约的顶层入口：类属性 packed_modules_mapping、(vllm_config, prefix) 构造、按 PP rank 建 lm_head/logits_processor
elide: embedding_modules 是 LoRA 用的子串映射，正文可一句带过
tie_word_embeddings / PP 非末段建 PPMissingLayer() 分支可简述：单卡 PP=1 走 is_last_rank=True 主路径

embed_excerpts.what: LlamaModel.__init__ —— embedding + make_layers 堆叠 decoder + 末段 norm；@support_torch_compile 装饰整个 LlamaModel
elide: @support_torch_compile 的 dynamic_arg_dims 标注 batch 维可动态，正文点到为止（torch.compile 是后续 custom-ops 章主题）
make_empty_intermediate_tensors_factory 为 PP 间传 hidden/residual 用，单卡可略
make_layers 内部按 PP 把 start..end 之外填 PPMissingLayer()，单卡 start=0 end=num_layers

embed_excerpts.what: LlamaAttention.__init__ 上半 —— TP 切头数学 + 三个并行线性层的构造（QKV/o_proj）
embed_excerpts.code:
class LlamaAttention(nn.Module):
    def __init__(
        self,
        config: LlamaConfig,
        hidden_size: int,
        num_heads: int,
        num_kv_heads: int,
        ...
        prefix: str = "",
        attn_type: str = AttentionType.DECODER,
    ) -> None:
        super().__init__()
        layer_idx = extract_layer_index(prefix)
        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
        tp_size = get_tensor_model_parallel_world_size()
        self.total_num_heads = num_heads
        assert self.total_num_heads % tp_size == 0
        self.num_heads = self.total_num_heads // tp_size
        self.total_num_kv_heads = num_kv_heads
        if self.total_num_kv_heads >= tp_size:
            # Number of KV heads is greater than TP size, so we partition
            # the KV heads across multiple tensor parallel GPUs.
            assert self.total_num_kv_heads % tp_size == 0
        else:
            # Number of KV heads is less than TP size, so we replicate
            # the KV heads across multiple tensor parallel GPUs.
            assert tp_size % self.total_num_kv_heads == 0
        self.num_kv_heads = max(1, self.total_num_kv_heads // tp_size)

        head_dim = getattr(config, "head_dim", None)
        self.head_dim = head_dim or self.hidden_size // self.total_num_heads
        self.q_size = self.num_heads * self.head_dim
        self.kv_size = self.num_kv_heads * self.head_dim
        self.scaling = self.head_dim**-0.5
        self.max_position_embeddings = max_position_embeddings

        self.qkv_proj = QKVParallelLinear(
            hidden_size=hidden_size,
            head_size=self.head_dim,
            total_num_heads=self.total_num_heads,
            total_num_kv_heads=self.total_num_kv_heads,
            bias=bias,
            quant_config=quant_config,
            prefix=f"{prefix}.qkv_proj",
        )

        self.o_proj = RowParallelLinear(
            input_size=self.total_num_heads * self.head_dim,
            output_size=hidden_size,
            bias=bias_o_proj,
            quant_config=quant_config,
            prefix=f"{prefix}.o_proj",
        )
elide: 签名里的 max_position_embeddings/bias/bias_o_proj/cache_config/quant_config 略写为 ...
GQA 的 KV 复制分支（tp_size > total_num_kv_heads）可作脚注：Llama-3-8B 8 个 KV 头通常 tp_size<=8 不触发复制

embed_excerpts.what: LlamaAttention：Attention 统一封装入口 + forward 主线（qkv→split→rope→attn→o_proj）
embed_excerpts.code:
attn_cls = (
            EncoderOnlyAttention
            if attn_type == AttentionType.ENCODER_ONLY
            else Attention
        )

        self.attn = attn_cls(
            self.num_heads,
            self.head_dim,
            self.scaling,
            num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads,
            cache_config=cache_config,
            quant_config=quant_config,
            per_layer_sliding_window=sliding_window,
            attn_type=attn_type,
            prefix=f"{prefix}.attn",
        )

    def forward(
        self,
        positions: torch.Tensor,
        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
    ) -> torch.Tensor:
        qkv, _ = self.qkv_proj(hidden_states)
        q, k, v = qkv.split([self.q_size, self.kv_size, self.kv_size], dim=-1)
        q, k = self.rotary_emb(positions, q, k)
        attn_output = self.attn(q, k, v)
        output, _ = self.o_proj(attn_output)
        return output
elide: decoder-only 的 Llama attn_type 恒为 DECODER → attn_cls=Attention，EncoderOnlyAttention 分支可一句带过（嵌入模型才用）
qkv_proj 返回 (tensor, bias) 元组，bias 被 _ 丢弃（无 bias）

embed_excerpts.what: LlamaDecoderLayer.forward —— pre-norm + fused add_residual 的 RMSNorm 协议（第二参 residual）
embed_excerpts.code:
def forward(
        self,
        positions: torch.Tensor,
        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
        residual: torch.Tensor | None,
    ) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:
        # Self Attention
        if residual is None:
            residual = hidden_states
            hidden_states = self.input_layernorm(hidden_states)
        else:
            hidden_states, residual = self.input_layernorm(hidden_states, residual)
        hidden_states = self.self_attn(positions=positions, hidden_states=hidden_states)

        # Fully Connected
        hidden_states, residual = self.post_attention_layernorm(hidden_states, residual)
        hidden_states = self.mlp(hidden_states)
        return hidden_states, residual
elide: RMSNorm 的双参形态（hidden, residual）把残差加法 fuse 进 norm kernel，正文需点明：residual 在层间显式穿针引线，不是隐式 +=

embed_excerpts.what: LlamaModel.load_weights —— stacked_params_mapping 把 checkpoint 的独立 q/k/v、gate/up 重命名+带 shard_id 装入 fused 参数；否则走 default 路径
embed_excerpts.code:
def load_weights(self, weights: Iterable[tuple[str, torch.Tensor]]) -> set[str]:
        stacked_params_mapping = [
            # (param_name, shard_name, shard_id)
            (".qkv_proj", ".q_proj", "q"),
            (".qkv_proj", ".k_proj", "k"),
            (".qkv_proj", ".v_proj", "v"),
            (".gate_up_proj", ".gate_proj", 0),
            (".gate_up_proj", ".up_proj", 1),
        ]
        params_dict = dict(self.named_parameters())
        loaded_params: set[str] = set()
        for name, loaded_weight in weights:
            if "rotary_emb.inv_freq" in name:
                continue
            ...
            for param_name, weight_name, shard_id in stacked_params_mapping:
                if weight_name not in name:
                    continue
                name = name.replace(weight_name, param_name)
                # Skip loading extra bias for GPTQ models.
                if name.endswith(".bias") and name not in params_dict:
                    continue
                if is_pp_missing_parameter(name, self):
                    continue
                param = params_dict[name]
                weight_loader = param.weight_loader
                weight_loader(param, loaded_weight, shard_id)
                break
            else:
                # Skip loading extra bias for GPTQ models.
                if name.endswith(".bias") and name not in params_dict:
                    continue
                if is_pp_missing_parameter(name, self):
                    continue
                param = params_dict[name]
                weight_loader = getattr(param, "weight_loader", default_weight_loader)
                weight_loader(param, loaded_weight)
            loaded_params.add(name)
        return loaded_params
elide: rotary_emb.cos_cached/sin_cached、kv-scale/zero_point 重映射等量化/兼容分支用 ... 省略，正文一句概括：跳过非参数与量化 scale 的特例
for/else：for 内 break 表示命中 stacked 映射；未命中走 else 用 default_weight_loader 直装（embed/norm/lm_head 等非 fused 权重）

embed_excerpts.what: QKVParallelLinear.__init__ —— GQA 下 KV 头按 tp 切分或复制、把 q/k/v 三段宽度记进 output_sizes（沿 output 维 fuse）
embed_excerpts.code:
def __init__(
        self,
        hidden_size: int,
        head_size: int,
        total_num_heads: int,
        total_num_kv_heads: int | None = None,
        ...
    ):
        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
        self.head_size = head_size
        self.v_head_size = v_head_size if v_head_size is not None else head_size
        self.total_num_heads = total_num_heads
        if total_num_kv_heads is None:
            total_num_kv_heads = total_num_heads
        self.total_num_kv_heads = total_num_kv_heads
        # Divide the weight matrix along the last dimension.
        tp_size = get_tensor_model_parallel_world_size() if not disable_tp else 1
        self.num_heads = divide(self.total_num_heads, tp_size)
        if tp_size >= self.total_num_kv_heads:
            self.num_kv_heads = 1
            self.num_kv_head_replicas = divide(tp_size, self.total_num_kv_heads)
        else:
            self.num_kv_heads = divide(self.total_num_kv_heads, tp_size)
            self.num_kv_head_replicas = 1
        input_size = self.hidden_size
        output_size = (
            self.num_heads * self.head_size
            + self.num_kv_heads * self.head_size
            + self.num_kv_heads * self.v_head_size
        ) * tp_size
        self.output_sizes = [
            self.num_heads * self.head_size * tp_size,  # q_proj
            self.num_kv_heads * self.head_size * tp_size,  # k_proj
            self.num_kv_heads * self.v_head_size * tp_size,  # v_proj
        ]

        super().__init__(
            input_size=input_size,
            output_size=output_size,
            ...
        )
elide: v_head_size 默认等于 head_size（Llama 用），MLA 等才区分 → 正文统一用 head_size
super().__init__ 的完整 kwargs 省略；关键是 output_sizes 三段交给 ColumnParallelLinear 切 partition

embed_excerpts.what: ColumnParallelLinear.__init__ —— 沿 output(列) 维按 tp_size 切分；output_sizes 存在时逐段切
embed_excerpts.code:
def __init__(
        self,
        input_size: int,
        output_size: int,
        ...
    ):
        # Divide the weight matrix along the last dimension.
        self.tp_rank = get_tensor_model_parallel_rank() if not disable_tp else 0
        self.tp_size = get_tensor_model_parallel_world_size() if not disable_tp else 1
        self.input_size_per_partition = input_size
        self.output_size_per_partition = divide(output_size, self.tp_size)
        self.output_partition_sizes = [self.output_size_per_partition]
        # If QKV or MergedColumn, use output size of each partition.
        if hasattr(self, "output_sizes"):
            self.output_partition_sizes = [
                divide(output_size, self.tp_size) for output_size in self.output_sizes
            ]
elide: create_weights/bias/quant_method 分配权重的细节用 ... 略；核心是列切分 = output_size//tp_size，input 不切

embed_excerpts.what: QKVParallelLinear.weight_loader 的 v1 装载主路径 —— 按 shard_id 算 fused 参数内 offset/size，再按 rank narrow 出磁盘切片
embed_excerpts.code:
assert loaded_shard_id in ["q", "k", "v"]

        # If output dim is defined, use the default loading process.
        if output_dim is not None:
            if loaded_shard_id == "q":
                shard_offset = 0
                shard_size = self.num_heads * self.head_size
            elif loaded_shard_id == "k":
                shard_offset = self.num_heads * self.head_size
                shard_size = self.num_kv_heads * self.head_size
            elif loaded_shard_id == "v":
                shard_offset = (self.num_heads + self.num_kv_heads) * self.head_size
                shard_size = self.num_kv_heads * self.v_head_size
            ...
            param_data = param_data.narrow(output_dim, shard_offset, shard_size)
            if loaded_shard_id == "q":
                shard_rank = self.tp_rank
            else:
                shard_rank = self.tp_rank // self.num_kv_head_replicas
            start_idx = shard_rank * shard_size

            if not is_sharded_weight:
                loaded_weight = loaded_weight.narrow(output_dim, start_idx, shard_size)
        ...
        assert param_data.shape == loaded_weight.shape
        param_data.copy_(loaded_weight)
elide: BlockQuantScale/packed_dim/Marlin/bitsandbytes 量化分支用 ... 省略——正文只讲非量化主路径
loaded_shard_id is None（磁盘已 fuse 的 Phi-3 式 qkv）分支可一句带过：拆成 q/k/v 递归调用
关键对比：q 用 tp_rank，k/v 用 tp_rank//num_kv_head_replicas → GQA 复制时多个 q-rank 共享同一份 kv 切片

embed_excerpts.what: RowParallelLinear.forward —— 行切分 + all_reduce 把各 rank 部分和归约（o_proj/down_proj 的归约点）
elide: input_is_parallel=True（来自 ColumnParallel 的列切输出）是默认路径；正文点明：列并行产出已切好的 input 直接喂行并行，无需再切
bias 只在 rank0 加、其余 rank 加完 all_reduce 会重复——这是 TP 正确性细节

embed_excerpts.what: Attention 统一封装层的职责声明与构造签名（num_heads/head_size/scale/num_kv_heads/prefix）
embed_excerpts.code:
class Attention(nn.Module, AttentionLayerBase):
    """Attention layer.

    This class takes query, key, and value tensors as input. The input tensors
    can either contain prompt tokens or generation tokens.
    The class does the following:

    1. Store the input key and value tensors in the KV cache.
    2. Perform (multi-head/multi-query/grouped-query) attention.
    3. Return the output tensor.
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        num_heads: int,
        head_size: int,
        scale: float,
        num_kv_heads: int | None = None,
        ...
        prefix: str = "",
        attn_type: str = AttentionType.DECODER,
        ...
    ) -> None:
elide: 大量量化/sliding_window/alibi/backend 选择 kwargs 用 ... 省略——正文只讲：Attention 把 backend 选择(get_attn_backend)与 KV cache 收口，模型定义只需给 heads/scale

embed_excerpts.what: Attention 把自身注册进 static_forward_context（按 layer_name=prefix）——prefix 即 KV cache 与 attn_metadata 的寻址键
embed_excerpts.code:
compilation_config = vllm_config.compilation_config
        if prefix in compilation_config.static_forward_context:
            raise ValueError(f"Duplicate layer name: {prefix}")
        compilation_config.static_forward_context[prefix] = self
        self.attn_type = attn_type
        ...
        # use a placeholder kv cache tensor during init, which will be replaced
        # by bind_kv_cache
        self.kv_cache = torch.tensor([])

        # Initialize KV cache quantization attributes
        _init_kv_cache_quant(self, quant_config, prefix)
elide: kv_sharing_target / query_quant 等分支省略；核心：prefix 唯一标识本层 → forward 时经 forward_context 按 layer_name 取回 kv_cache/attn_metadata（呼应 (vllm_config, prefix) 契约的 prefix 用途）

key_classes.name: LlamaForCausalLM
key_classes.responsibility: 顶层模型契约入口：(vllm_config, prefix) 构造，持有类属性 packed_modules_mapping，建 self.model + lm_head + logits_processor；forward 透传给 self.model，compute_logits 经 lm_head 出 logits；load_weights 用 AutoWeightsLoader 分发

key_classes.name: LlamaModel
key_classes.responsibility: embedding + make_layers 堆叠 N 个 LlamaDecoderLayer + 末段 RMSNorm；前向 embed→逐层→norm；load_weights 持有 stacked_params_mapping 把 q/k/v、gate/up fuse 装载；被 @support_torch_compile 包裹

key_classes.name: LlamaDecoderLayer
key_classes.responsibility: 单层 transformer block：self_attn(LlamaAttention)+mlp(LlamaMLP)+两个 RMSNorm；forward 走 pre-norm + 显式 residual 穿针；从 vllm_config 解包 config/cache/quant

key_classes.name: LlamaAttention
key_classes.responsibility: 注意力子模块：TP 切头数学，构造 qkv_proj(QKVParallelLinear)+o_proj(RowParallelLinear)+rotary_emb(get_rope)+attn(Attention 统一封装)；forward: qkv→split→rope→attn→o_proj

key_classes.name: LlamaMLP
key_classes.responsibility: 前馈子模块：gate_up_proj(MergedColumnParallelLinear)+down_proj(RowParallelLinear)+SiluAndMul；列并行升维→SiLU 门控→行并行降维归约

key_classes.name: Attention
key_classes.responsibility: 统一注意力封装：吸收 backend 选择(get_attn_backend)、KV cache 存储/量化、按 prefix 注册进 static_forward_context；forward 经自定义算子 unified_attention_with_output 经 forward_context 取 attn_metadata/kv_cache，对模型定义透明

key_classes.name: ColumnParallelLinear
key_classes.responsibility: 列并行线性层：权重沿 output 维按 tp_size 切，output_size_per_partition=output_size//tp_size，input 不切；weight_loader 按 tp_rank narrow 出本 rank 列切片；forward 可选 gather_output

key_classes.name: MergedColumnParallelLinear
key_classes.responsibility: ColumnParallel 子类：把多段(gate,up)沿 output 维 fuse，按 output_sizes 各自切分；weight_loader 带 shard_id(0/1) 定位段 offset 再按 rank narrow

key_classes.name: QKVParallelLinear
key_classes.responsibility: ColumnParallel 子类：把 q/k/v fuse 成一个权重；GQA 下 KV 头数<tp 时复制(num_kv_head_replicas)否则切分；weight_loader 按 shard_id(q/k/v) 定位段，q 用 tp_rank、k/v 用 tp_rank//replicas

key_classes.name: RowParallelLinear
key_classes.responsibility: 行并行线性层：权重沿 input 维按 tp_size 切，input_size_per_partition=input_size//tp_size；forward 后 all_reduce 归约各 rank 部分和；bias 只在 rank0 加避免重复

key_classes.name: LinearBase
key_classes.responsibility: 线性层基类：持 quant_method(默认 UnquantizedLinearMethod)，统一 forward 经 quant_method.apply 做 GEMM；记 tp_rank/tp_size

key_classes.name: DefaultModelLoader / BaseModelLoader
key_classes.responsibility: load_model 编排：initialize_model 建空壳→load_weights(get_all_weights 流式喂 checkpoint)→process_weights_after_loading→eval；load_weights 调 model.load_weights 并可 track 已加载参数集

key_classes.name: AutoWeightsLoader
key_classes.responsibility: 递归权重分发器：按子模块名匹配，遇到自带 load_weights 的子模块(如 LlamaModel)就委派；支持 skip_prefixes(tie 时跳 lm_head)

data_flow.what: 按 load_config.load_format 取 DefaultModelLoader，调 load_model(vllm_config, model_config, prefix)
set_default_torch_dtype + 在 target_device 上下文里 initialize_model() 建空壳模型（参数尚未填值）

get_model_architecture 拿 LlamaForCausalLM，校验其 __init__ 接受 (vllm_config, prefix)，在 set_current_vllm_config 内实例化 → 触发 LlamaForCausalLM→LlamaModel→DecoderLayer→{Attention,MLP} 四级嵌套构造，各并行线性层在构造时即按 tp_rank/tp_size 分配自己那份空参数
model.load_weights(get_all_weights(...))：把磁盘 checkpoint 的 (name, tensor) 流喂给 LlamaForCausalLM.load_weights
AutoWeightsLoader 递归，遇 self.model 委派给 LlamaModel.load_weights；tie 时 skip lm_head
对每个 checkpoint 权重名：若匹配 stacked_params_mapping(.q_proj→.qkv_proj 等) 则重写名并带 shard_id 调该 fused 参数的 weight_loader；否则 default_weight_loader 直装
按 shard_id 算 fused 参数内 offset/size，再按 tp_rank narrow 出本 rank 的磁盘切片 copy 进去——一次完成 fuse + TP 切分
各层 quant_method.process_weights_after_loading（重排 kernel 格式）；对 Attention 层调 module.process_weights_after_loading(dtype)（初始化/校正 kv scale）；model.eval()
embed_input_ids → 逐层 LlamaDecoderLayer(positions, hidden, residual) → 末 RMSNorm；input_ids/positions/inputs_embeds 由 model runner 喂入
qkv_proj(列并行,产本 rank 的 q/k/v)→split→rotary_emb→self.attn(Attention)→o_proj(行并行+all_reduce)
reshape q/k/v→unified_kv_cache_update 写 KV cache + unified_attention_with_output；二者经 forward_context 按 layer_name(prefix) 取 attn_metadata/kv_cache，再 self.impl.forward 调具体 backend

design_decisions.decision: (vllm_config, prefix) 统一构造契约：所有 v1 模型类 __init__ 只接受 vllm_config 与 prefix 两个关键字参数
design_decisions.why: 把全局配置收口成单一对象，模型从中自取 hf_config/quant_config/cache_config；prefix 编码模块在 state-dict 中的全路径，既用于权重名匹配，也用于 Attention 注册 static_forward_context 的 layer_name。initialize_model 显式校验该签名，老式签名走 deprecation 兼容路径

design_decisions.decision: prefix 既是权重名又是 KV cache/metadata 寻址键
design_decisions.why: make_layers 用 f'{prefix}.layers.{idx}' 命名每层，逐级下传到 qkv_proj/o_proj/attn；Attention 把 prefix 作 layer_name 注册进 static_forward_context，运行期 forward_context 据此取回本层 kv_cache 与 attn_metadata——一根 prefix 串起静态权重与动态缓存

design_decisions.decision: QKV 三投影 fuse 成单个 QKVParallelLinear、gate/up fuse 成 MergedColumnParallelLinear
design_decisions.why: 把三次(两次)小 GEMM 合成一次大 GEMM 提升带宽利用与 kernel 效率；fuse 与 TP 列切分天然兼容（每段独立按 output 维切）。代价是 checkpoint 里是分开的 q/k/v、gate/up，需 stacked_params_mapping + shard_id 在装载时重组

design_decisions.decision: 列并行(QKV/gate_up)接行并行(o_proj/down_proj)的成对结构，归约只在行并行末尾发生一次
design_decisions.why: ColumnParallel 输出已沿 head/intermediate 维切好(input_is_parallel)，直接喂 RowParallel 无需通信；RowParallel 在 forward 末用 all_reduce 把各 rank 部分和汇总。整个 attention/MLP 子块内通信被压到一次 all_reduce

design_decisions.decision: GQA 下 KV 头数小于 TP size 时复制而非切分（num_kv_head_replicas）
design_decisions.why: KV 头数(如 8)可能小于 tp_size，无法整切；此时 num_kv_heads=1，num_kv_head_replicas=tp//total_kv，多个 q-rank 共享同一份 K/V。weight_loader 对 k/v 用 tp_rank//num_kv_head_replicas 定位，保证复制 rank 拿到同一磁盘切片

design_decisions.decision: Attention 作统一封装入口，吸收 backend 选择与 KV cache，模型定义对后端无感
design_decisions.why: LlamaAttention 只给 num_heads/head_size/scale/num_kv_heads；Attention 内部 get_attn_backend 选 FlashAttn/Triton 等、管 KV cache 与量化 scale、注册 forward_context。模型代码不碰 backend 细节，换后端不改模型——这是 vLLM 支持多模型×多后端的解耦点

design_decisions.decision: RMSNorm 采用 (hidden, residual) 双参形态，把残差加法 fuse 进 norm，residual 在层间显式传递
design_decisions.why: pre-norm transformer 里 residual 不是隐式 x+=，而是显式张量沿层链穿针；第一层 residual=None 时取 hidden 初始化。fuse add+norm 省一次 kernel 启动与一次显存往返

design_decisions.decision: 权重装载三段式 initialize_model → load_weights → process_weights_after_loading，且 load_weights 流式消费 checkpoint
design_decisions.why: 先建空壳（参数按 TP 分好形状但未填值），再流式喂 checkpoint（边读边切边填，峰值显存可控），最后 process 阶段做 kernel 重排与 kv scale 初始化。三段职责清晰、与量化/PP/TP 正交

design_decisions.decision: AutoWeightsLoader 递归委派 + stacked_params_mapping 的 for/else 双路
design_decisions.why: 顶层 AutoWeightsLoader 按子模块名递归，遇自带 load_weights 的 LlamaModel 即委派，使复合模型(带 adapter/draft)可复用；LlamaModel 内 for 命中 stacked 映射走 fused 装载(break)，未命中走 else 用 default_weight_loader 直装 embed/norm/lm_head 等非 fused 权重

design_decisions.decision: Llama 作最简基线：无压缩/无专家/无潜在瓶颈/无混合计算残差
design_decisions.why: Llama 是后续所有模型章(custom ops、DeepSeek-V4)的对照基准。显式标注其'缺'什么，让 DeepSeek-V4 章把每个新增(MLA latent bottleneck、MoE experts、量化压缩、hybrid 残差)作为对 Llama 的 delta 引入
design_decisions.evidence: outline-final.json ch22 scope contrast hook; 全文无 MoE/MLA/quant-fuse 结构

theory.topic: TP 列切分 vs 行切分的形状与通信代价
theory.content: ColumnParallel：W∈R^{in×out} 沿 out 切成 tp 份，每 rank 持 W_i∈R^{in×(out/tp)}，输出 Y_i=XW_i 已沿 out 维切；无 forward 通信。RowParallel：W 沿 in 切成 W_i∈R^{(in/tp)×out}，输入 X_i 已切，Y_i=X_iW_i 是部分和，需 all_reduce 求 Y=ΣY_i。一个 attention/MLP 子块=列并行(无通信)+行并行(1 次 all_reduce)，单层通信量 O(batch×seq×hidden)

theory.topic: QKV fuse 后的内存布局与 shard_id offset 公式
theory.content: fused qkv 权重沿 output 维布局为 [q段 | k段 | v段]，每 rank 段宽 = num_heads×head_size(q)、num_kv_heads×head_size(k)、num_kv_heads×v_head_size(v)。weight_loader 按 shard_id 取 offset：q→0、k→num_heads×head_size、v→(num_heads+num_kv_heads)×head_size，size 为各自段宽；再按 rank 在磁盘全量上 narrow(start_idx=shard_rank×shard_size)。GQA 复制时 k/v 的 shard_rank=tp_rank//num_kv_head_replicas

theory.topic: GQA 的 num_kv_heads / num_kv_head_replicas 推导
theory.content: 设 total_num_kv_heads=K、tp_size=P。若 K≥P：num_kv_heads=K/P，replicas=1（正常切分）。若 K<P：num_kv_heads=1，replicas=P/K（复制），即每 K 个连续 rank 共享一份 KV。Llama-3-8B K=8，常见 P≤8 故多走切分；P=8 时每 rank 恰 1 个 KV 头

theory.topic: 四级模块嵌套与 prefix 串联
theory.content: LlamaForCausalLM(prefix='') → model(prefix='model') → layers.{i}(prefix='model.layers.{i}') → self_attn(prefix='model.layers.{i}.self_attn') → qkv_proj/attn(prefix='....qkv_proj'/'....attn')。prefix 既是 state-dict 权重名前缀（决定 checkpoint 匹配），也是 Attention 在 static_forward_context 的 key（决定运行期 kv_cache/metadata 寻址）

delete.what: GGUF 相关全部分支：is_gguf_weight / is_gguf_weight_type / materialize / data_container（linear.py 各 weight_loader 内；llama.py load_weights 的 rotary_emb.cos_cached/sin_cached skip）
delete.why_safe: GGUF 是特定量化格式，与 Llama BF16 主线无关；精简版只跑非量化 safetensors，删后主路径 copy_ 不变

delete.what: 量化分支：BlockQuantScaleParameter / packed_dim / packed_factor / adjust_marlin_shard / adjust_block_scale_shard / use_bitsandbytes_4bit / needs_scalar_to_array / adjust_scalar_to_fused_array（各 weight_loader 内）
delete.why_safe: 精简版 quant_config=None 走 UnquantizedLinearMethod，这些分支恒不触发；删后非量化 narrow+copy 主路径完整

delete.what: weight_loader_v2 / load_column_parallel_weight / load_row_parallel_weight / BasevLLMParameter 体系及 WEIGHT_LOADER_V2_SUPPORTED 选择逻辑
delete.why_safe: v2 loader 仅量化方法(Fp8/AWQ/GPTQ 等)走；非量化用 v1 weight_loader，create_weights 的 weight_loader 选择恒选 v1。精简版只留 v1

delete.what: Attention.__init__ 的 KV cache 量化(_init_kv_cache_quant 内 should_load_quant_weights 分支)、query_quant/QuantFP8、kv_cache_dtype_skip_layers、calculate_kv_scales、alibi_sqrt、prefix-caching+batch-invariant 警告
delete.why_safe: 均为量化/特殊 backend/sink 路径；BF16 Llama 不触发。保留 backend 选择、static_forward_context 注册、kv_cache 占位与 reshape 主线即可

delete.what: Attention.forward 的 use_direct_call=False 分支(torch.ops.vllm.* 包装)，只保留 use_direct_call=True 的直接调用路径
delete.why_safe: 二者语义等价(一个走 custom op、一个直调)；精简版选其一即可示意 unified_kv_cache_update + unified_attention_with_output 两步，不必两路都留

delete.what: PP(pipeline parallel)相关：PPMissingLayer / is_pp_missing_parameter / get_pp_group().is_first/last_rank 的非主分支 / make_empty_intermediate_tensors / intermediate_tensors 在 forward 的 PP 路径 / make_layers 的 start..end 之外填充
delete.why_safe: 精简版聚焦单 PP-stage(world=1)，is_first=is_last=True 恒成立，PP 占位层从不命中；删后 forward 主线 embed→layers→norm 完整

delete.what: EncoderOnlyAttention 分支 / attn_type==ENCODER_ONLY / is_causal=False / Bidirectional 子类(LlamaBidirectional*)
delete.why_safe: Llama 解码器恒 DECODER；嵌入模型变体不在本章范围。保留 attn_type=DECODER 主线

delete.what: Eagle/Eagle3/draft 相关：EagleModelMixin._maybe_add_hidden_state / aux_hidden_states / SupportsEagle* / target_layer_count 的 layer_types 调整 / layer_type 可替换参数
delete.why_safe: 投机解码 draft 模型特性，与基线推理无关；删后 forward 返回单 hidden_states 主路径完整

delete.what: LoRA 相关：SupportsLoRA / embedding_modules / packed_modules_mapping 仅作为类属性保留其值但删去 LoRA 用途说明分支
delete.why_safe: packed_modules_mapping 本身要 must_keep（解释 fuse 来源）；但 LoRA 注入逻辑不在本章，类属性留值即可

delete.what: logits_soft_cap / per_layer_sliding_window 非 None 分支 / layer_types sliding_attention / get_quant_config 覆写 / _maybe_allow_fp8_block_shape_mismatch
delete.why_safe: Llama 标准配置无 soft cap、无 sliding window、无 fp8 block；这些分支恒为默认值，删后构造主线不变

must_keep.why: 顶层契约入口，读者必须看到 (vllm_config, prefix) 构造与 self.model/lm_head 组织
embedding+堆叠+norm 的容器，承载 stacked_params_mapping 装载逻辑
单层 block，pre-norm+residual 协议在此体现
TP 切头 + qkv/o_proj + rope + Attention 封装的汇合点
gate_up/down + SiluAndMul，列并行接行并行的最简范例
声明 qkv_proj←q/k/v、gate_up_proj←gate/up 的 fuse 来源，writer 需据此讲清装载重命名
load_weights 核心：把 checkpoint 独立投影名重写并带 shard_id，读者必须理解这步
QKV fuse + GQA 切分/复制的关键类
gate/up fuse 的列并行类
列切分基类，output_size_per_partition 的来源
行切分 + all_reduce 归约，TP 通信点
统一封装入口，吸收 backend/KV cache，模型定义与后端解耦的核心
各并行线性层的装载方法名，lint 需见其按 shard_id/tp_rank narrow
GQA 复制语义的可检测符号，k/v 装载 rank 计算依赖它
fused 层各段宽度，切 partition 与算 offset 的依据
rotary embedding 工厂，LlamaAttention 必用
RowParallel forward 的归约调用，TP 正确性可检测点
TP 切分的 tp_size 来源
三段式装载第一段：建空壳并校验 (vllm_config, prefix) 签名
三段式第三段：kernel 重排 + Attention kv scale 初始化
递归权重分发器，顶层 load_weights 委派机制
非 fused 权重(embed/norm/lm_head)的直装路径，for/else 的 else 分支
按 prefix 命名堆叠 decoder layer，prefix 串联的体现
prefix 拼接工具，模块命名契约的一环
从 prefix 解析层号，attention 构造需要
pre-norm + fused residual 的归一化层
MLP 门控激活，gate_up 拆两半相乘
词嵌入并行层，模型入口
输出投影层，compute_logits 用

diagram_plan.name: module-nesting
diagram_plan.title: 四级模块嵌套与 prefix 串联
diagram_plan.spec: 树形图：LlamaForCausalLM(prefix='') → [model: LlamaModel, lm_head: ParallelLMHead] → LlamaModel → [embed_tokens, layers.0..N-1: LlamaDecoderLayer, norm] → LlamaDecoderLayer → [input_layernorm, self_attn: LlamaAttention, post_attention_layernorm, mlp: LlamaMLP] → LlamaAttention → [qkv_proj: QKVParallelLinear, rotary_emb, attn: Attention, o_proj: RowParallelLinear] → LlamaMLP → [gate_up_proj: MergedColumnParallelLinear, act_fn: SiluAndMul, down_proj: RowParallelLinear]。每个节点标注其 prefix(如 model.layers.0.self_attn.qkv_proj)，右侧注明 prefix 同时是权重名前缀与(Attention 处)KV cache key

diagram_plan.name: tp-sharding-flow
diagram_plan.title: TP 列并行接行并行：一个 attention 子块内的切分与归约
diagram_plan.spec: 横向数据流：hidden_states(全量) →[QKVParallelLinear 列切, 各 rank 持 q/k/v 部分头]→ q_i,k_i,v_i →[rope]→[Attention 本 rank 头]→ attn_out_i →[RowParallelLinear o_proj 行切]→ partial_i →[all_reduce]→ output(全量)。上方标注 ColumnParallel=沿 output 切/无通信，RowParallel=沿 input 切/末尾 1 次 all_reduce。用 2 个 rank(tp=2)示意，画出权重矩阵被切成两块的色块

diagram_plan.name: weight-load-pipeline
diagram_plan.title: 权重装载三段式与 qkv fuse
diagram_plan.spec: 三阶段泳道：(1) initialize_model 建空壳[qkv_proj 空参数, 形状已按 tp 切]；(2) load_weights：checkpoint 中独立 q_proj/k_proj/v_proj 经 stacked_params_mapping 重命名→qkv_proj + shard_id(q/k/v)，weight_loader 按 offset+tp_rank narrow 切片填入 fused 参数对应段；(3) process_weights_after_loading: kernel 重排 + Attention kv scale。中央画 fused qkv 参数 [q段|k段|v段] 三色块，三个 checkpoint 张量箭头各指向对应段

roadmap_highlight.label: 模型定义层
roadmap_highlight.context: Part VI 模型层开篇。上游：ch20/ch21 model runner 把 input_ids/positions/inputs_embeds 喂入；本章确立 (vllm_config, prefix) 契约 + TP 线性层 + Attention 封装 + 权重装载；下游：custom-ops 章与 DeepSeek-V4 章在此基线上叠加 MLA/MoE/量化等 delta

foreshadow_due.note: scripts/bible.py due ch22 返回空(无应埋/应回收登记)。本章为 Part VI 开篇基线，建议埋设供后续模型章回收的伏笔(非强制，由 writer/archivist 决定)：(a) Llama '缺'压缩/专家/潜在瓶颈/混合残差 → DeepSeek-V4 章作 delta 回收；(b) Attention 统一封装抽象 backend → custom-ops 章回收；(c) packed_modules_mapping/stacked_params_mapping fuse 模式 → 后续异构模型权重装载回收。
